positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical bio-luminescent cosmic forest pattern, featuring intertwining crystalline flora and ethereal deep-sea mandalas. Illuminated by soft, otherworldly point lights and star constellations. Vector-graphic quality mixed with detailed digital painting style.
